Gallery Drip Coffee

แกลเลอรี่ ดริปคอฟฟี่

4.5
★ ★ ★ ★ ★
180 reviews
Origin Curated Thai Single Origins
Roast Levels light medium
Price Range ฿320–600 / 200g
Founded 2015
Formats ground, whole bean, drip bag

Gallery Drip Coffee curates single-origin Thai coffees presented as a rotating 'gallery' of lots — each bag is a distinct artwork of flavor. Focused on transparency, with full farm and processing details on every package.

Flavor Profile

Rotating seasonal lots, each distinct. Thai single-origins often feature: wild honey, dried tropical fruit, gentle herbs, and creamy body depending on processing. Always traceable to specific farms.

Tasting Notes

wild honey dried tropical fruit gentle herbs creamy

Flavor Breakdown

Body
3/5
Acidity
4/5
Sweetness
4/5
Bitterness
1/5
Aroma
5/5
